name: manager
description: Skills for defining and working towards professional goals — standup, shutdown, sync, and goal-setting

manager_directory.title: Manager Directory
manager_directory.description: Directory where goals, journal entries, and other manager files are saved (e.g. ~/manager, ~/Documents/manager). Daily standup/shutdown entries go in a `daily/` subdirectory.

review_day.title: Weekly Review Day
review_day.description: Day of the week for weekly reviews (e.g. Friday, Monday). Defaults to Friday if not set.
